fixtures.title: Gate-heavy fix loop
fixtures.objective: Measure prompt churn and execution stability when repeated validation output dominates the flow.
fixtures.startingState: A bounded repo task that requires at least two edit and rerun cycles before all quality gates pass.
fixtures.decisiveEvidenceLocation: validate transcripts plus per-hook render telemetry

fixtures.title: Long-flow continuation
fixtures.objective: Check whether a multi-step implementation stays coherent across diagnosis, edit, rerun, and follow-up correction.
fixtures.startingState: A task with at least one incomplete first fix and enough intermediate output to pressure prompt budget.
fixtures.decisiveEvidenceLocation: turn-by-turn task transcript plus final validation summary

fixtures.title: Large-output diagnosis
fixtures.objective: Verify that the real failure cause is still found when the decisive clue appears late in verbose stderr or test output.
fixtures.startingState: A failing command or test run with many irrelevant lines before the actionable assertion or stack frame.
fixtures.decisiveEvidenceLocation: stored command output plus evaluator diagnosis note

fixtures.title: Interrupted recovery continuation
fixtures.objective: Check whether the resumed run continues safely after interruption without re-breaking already fixed behavior.
fixtures.startingState: A partially completed task with preserved checkpoints, prior failures, and remaining work that depends on earlier output.
fixtures.decisiveEvidenceLocation: resume transcript, checkpoint handoff, and final validation outcome
